title: SELECT statement throws str_cast exception
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (type TEXT NOT NULL, output TEXT NOT NULL, output_min_time_value_1 INTEGER, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT output_min_time_value_1 FROM test WHERE type = 'OUTPUT' AND output = 'greet_person' OR output_min_time_value_1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT statement with specific WHERE clause
